context: discuss-phase (gray-area discussion in progress; no PLAN.md yet)

completed_tasks.progress: Arc+vertex editing decided IN; self-intersection=block (proposed, not objected); ONE open sub-decision remains

decisions.rationale: Validated by interactive demo (spike 003c); 1:1 with the spike-003 solver; only gesture that reaches major arcs (>180deg)

decisions.decision: Straight<->arc switching while drawing = BOTH momentary hold-key + sticky toggle; default edge straight
decisions.rationale: Hold-key for one-off curves, toggle for runs; user wanted full flexibility

decisions.decision: Snap activation = ON by default + hold-key suspend (1 point) + persistent toggle; keys (Alt/F3) TBD vs Phase 9 bindings
decisions.rationale: CAD-standard; precise default with easy escape

decisions.decision: Snap indicator = per-type glyphs (square=vertex/endpoint, triangle=on-segment, X reserved for intersection)
decisions.rationale: Shape conveys snap type so estimator trusts what was grabbed

decisions.decision: Snap targets SHIP = vertex/endpoint + nearest-point-on-segment + close-the-loop (own start vertex); DEFER intersection + grid
decisions.rationale: Success-criteria + spike 002; intersection is costliest (O(k^2)) and validated separately later

decisions.decision: Snap rule: snap to OTHER markups freely; for in-progress/edited markup snap only to its own START vertex (never own intermediate vertex / actively-dragged vertex). Applies in placement AND editing
decisions.rationale: Avoids a shape snapping to itself

decisions.decision: Arc + vertex editing IN this phase: drag endpoint vertex re-solves arc, drag on-arc bulge handle reshapes; snapping + sagitta cap + self-intersection guard apply on edit; all undoable; round-trips save/BOQ
decisions.rationale: User requested editing; reuses Phase 12 drag infra + spike-003 solver; absorbs drag-to-bulge as the EDIT gesture

decisions.decision: Self-intersection on area/perimeter commit = BLOCK + keep editing (proposed; sagitta cap prevents most)
decisions.rationale: Never store/export a wrong quantity; success criterion 5 says detect+warn

decisions.decision: Cross-cutting: every new tool/gesture/shortcut/indicator must be documented manual-ready as built (How-To-Manual is its own future phase)
decisions.rationale: User requirement 2026-06-26; saved to memory project-howto-manual
